name: Potato Pancakes German Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate raw potatoes into a medium grater.
2. Combine grated potatoes with 2 1/2 cups of water to which lemon juice has been added. Place the mixture in a strainer or cheese cloth and drain off the liquid well.
3. Beat both raw and cooked potatoes, egg, milk, and salt until they form a batter.
4. Using about 3 tablespoons of oil per batch, drop spoonfuls of batter into hot oil in a large frying pan to form 3 or 4 pancakes at a time.
5. When the pancakes are firm on the bottom side, loosen the edges with a spatula and turn them over.
6. Brown the other side of the pancakes in the oil. Remove from the oil using tongs and drain on paper towels.
7. Keep the cooked pancakes warm. Repeat the process until all the batter is used.
8. Serve immediately. If served with meat, sprinkle with salt. If served with applesauce, sprinkle with sugar.
